reviews.review_description: I had this game a while back and decided to give it a try again and just wow, it didn’t disappoint. The gameplay is still super polished and smooth, it beats most vr games even though this game is almost 10 years old! And I don’t know why people are giving bad reviews for the fact it doesn’t have multiplayer anymore even though it says that in bold text in the description and it’s pretty visible. And the remake only cost 5$ more and it’s an even better version of course of this game with everything polished and everyone’s favorite multiplayer modes. I’m most likely buying 2 because of the horde modes because that’s my favorite part of Arizona sunshine.

loved it evan if it's old but it refuses for me to play
 the game so I can't play it but I loved it :)

reviews.review_title: Probably just play the remake, but...
reviews.review_description:
The only real reason to purchase this now is to play the original game and see where it came from, it was one of my first favorite vr games and I played it to death solo and in co op...but now theyve taken offline multiplayer servers so just be aware of that if youre really still wanting to play the original...

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
I love this game, I've been wanting to play it for a very long time but when I decided to try it it was absolutely amazing, the only thing I wish was back was the multiplayer
Me and my best friend have played this game at least 2 times a week for years, WHY?? WHY DID YOU TAKE MULTI PLAYER????. because REMAKE is a joke ! It's nothing like the original!!! Very upsetting 😡

Wanted to play multiplayer found out severs where shut down abloute waste of money and i cant refund it because i spent 3 hours trying to get multi player to work so if meta you read this you smell like my dogs hair (he has a mohawk we call him jimmy newtron) dont buy its bad

Pretty upset at the dev team for making a new version we need to pay for that has the updates we all need… most of my other favorite games keep it within the same when they update (dungeons of eternity, demeo & Elvin assassin, Death Horizon to name a few). Here we have to pay again??? I understand for Arizona Sunshine 2 but you could’ve just let us get the updates in the game…

People make videos of your game and people see it and there like oh i like this game im gonna get it and then they play for years and then one day multiplayer just disappeared out of no were and now everyone is breaking out because of it AND THATS WHY THEY NEED TO BRING IT BACK October 10 2025.

I’ve had this game for quite some time and have played through it numerous amount of times. This game is great and would be better if multiplayer mode wasn’t remove. I will admit the remake and second games are great but the first and original game will always hold a special place in our hearts. The game itself is very fun, the entire campaign and DLC and playing it with friends would make sharing this experience so much better. Please bring it back.
Owned this for ages and finally got around to playing it. Relatively short campaign but lots of zombie killing fun.

reviews.review_title: I made a mistake which was buying this
reviews.review_description:
This was the worst mistake I've made when it comes to money because RIGHT AFTER I bought this the deluxe version and remake were at a lower price than the base game itself. This game is buggy as Skyrim somehow (especially the zombies, and you miss them half the time) and the graphics look like an old Nokia's. COMPLETE waste of money and now I've played too long to get a danm refund because I thought the story was gonna get better than cocomelon over time. no healing items spawn in the undead valley map in Horde mode which nags at me me off even more.   
btw you actually took the time to look at the two star reviews :O

And every problem i had with the game was greatly fixed in the second game so id recommend that one! Plus in number two u get a cute dog and i love him but anyway- this game is fun!

reviews.review_title: Great game but how do I exchange?
reviews.review_description: One of the best vr zombie shooters out there, great story, good game mechanics and gameplay, but I was wondering how I can exchange the original for the remake. I saw that it’s 10 bucks, but maybe it was a timed deal. Please I need to know if it’s 10 bucks because that’s a hell of a deal!
Like the game but disappointed to finish just in one afternoon 😕 😪 😞 approx 3 hours.

This game looks absolutely terrible and plays just as bad. Graphics look slightly better than a PS1. Other players look super weird and awkward while walking. The game play is one of the lamest as far as shooters go, and reloading is just kinda weird. I get that it was an early VR game but it has definitely not aged well at all and have no idea why it continues to get good reviews. It’s baffling….

I simply love this game and I don't care that some of the graphics are smudged there's a 2nd one that is 8x better in every way this game is a classic in my book. And if you're wondering what weapons are in this game there is an M9, M1911, AK47, a revolver, a desert eagle, grenades and more

I hope in like 5-7 years there will be a third Arizona Sunshine

reviews.review_title: Too much reliance on gun mechanics
reviews.review_description: Trying to make it realistic is understandable but too much focus on gun mechanics such and loading, reloading, etc really detracts from what would have been a great experience.

reviews.review_title: Very good, but needs multiplayer boost
reviews.review_description: This game would shine, if the price is lower. Maybe a  limited discount  event, so it will be more populated in multi. Also, in horde mode it's bit too long before it gets challenging. Could use levelling, like unique skins/weapons system dependent on level (see elven assassin), and cooler horde maps: maybe two camps for two persons with a horde going in middle? Definitely could scale difficulty faster!.
This game f**kin sucks your aim misses basically every time and the graphics are absolutely sh*t
Great game, I love to play with my friends. I wish that there were melee weapons though.

Amazing title for VR. Has a decent story with dialogue that makes you feel immersed in a battle against the undead. It's more fun when playing with people. Great community and can lose yourself in the game. Give it a try! 🔥🔥

It is a really good game, for relax and shoot some zombies. 
Bad point for me is, in this game it is too hard to understand which gun is better for you. Only on second play you will play better and can try to beat harder difficult. 
I put 5 stars because developers really made good attractions but they must improve their selves.
Hope all next project will be big step forward.

I really glad to play this game.

Honestly it’s not a bad game. Is it worth $40. Probably not. I still enjoyed it. The story mode is pretty good and it’s easy to get the hang of. The only thing I don’t like is the horde mode. It’s fun and all but there is only one map. I would definitely recommend getting this game if the added more maps because that’s what it’s missing. And maybe bring the price down to $29.99 instead of $39.99
I’m very happy with the Oculus product, this is the first game that i purchased and i have to say, it different 👍🏼
It’s a good, well made game, just wish the graphics were better.
